export type CellRawValue = CellValuePrimitive | RichText
export type CellValue = CellValuePrimitive | CellError
export type CellWriteData = Pick<StoreCellData, 'raw' | 'formula' | 'identityFormula' | 'computed'>
export type FormulaA1 = string & { readonly [formulaA1Brand]: true; }
export type KernelCellData = CellWriteData
export type RecordValues = { [key: ColId]: CellValue; }
export type SheetId = string & { readonly [__sheetId]: true; }

export type AdvancedFilterMode = 'inPlace' | 'copyTo'
export type AdvancedFilterOptions = AdvancedFilterInPlaceOptions | AdvancedFilterCopyToOptions
export type AdvancedFilterResult = AdvancedFilterInPlaceResult | AdvancedFilterCopyToResult
export type CFDataBarAxisPosition = 'automatic' | 'midpoint' | 'none'
export type CFIconSetName = '3Arrows' | '3ArrowsGray' | '3Flags' | '3TrafficLights1' | '3TrafficLights2' | '3Signs' | '3Symbols' | '3Symbols2' | '3Stars' | '3Triangles' | '4Arrows' | '4ArrowsGray' | ' ...
export type CFOperator = 'greaterThan' | 'lessThan' | 'greaterThanOrEqual' | 'lessThanOrEqual' | 'equal' | 'notEqual' | 'between' | 'notBetween'
export type CFRule = CFCellValueRule | CFFormulaRule | CFColorScaleRule | CFDataBarRule | CFIconSetRule | CFTop10Rule | CFAboveAverageRule | CFDuplicateValuesRule | CFContainsTextRule | CFContainsBlan ...
export type CFRuleInput = Omit<CFRule, 'id' | 'priority'>
export type CFRuleType = 'cellValue' | 'formula' | 'colorScale' | 'dataBar' | 'iconSet' | 'top10' | 'aboveAverage' | 'duplicateValues' | 'containsText' | 'containsBlanks' | 'containsErrors' | 'timePer ...
export type CFTextOperator = 'contains' | 'notContains' | 'beginsWith' | 'endsWith'
export type CFValueType = 'min' | 'max' | 'percent' | 'percentile' | 'number' | 'formula'
export type CellStyleSource = 'all' | 'builtIn' | 'custom'
export type CellValue = CellValuePrimitive | CellError
export type ChangeOrigin = 'direct' | 'cascade' | 'remote'
export type ChartSeriesDimension = 'categories' | 'values' | 'bubbleSizes'
export type ChartType = 'bar' | 'column' | 'line' | 'area' | 'pie' | 'doughnut' | 'scatter' | 'bubble' | 'combo' | 'radar' | 'stock' | 'funnel' | 'waterfall' | 'surface' | 'surface3d' | 'ofPie' | 'bar ...
export type ClearApplyTo = 'all' | 'contents' | 'formats' | 'hyperlinks'
export type CommentContentType = 'plain' | 'mention'
export type CommentType = 'note' | 'threadedComment'

export type AppId = string & { readonly __brand?: 'AppId'; }
export type AuditEventType = 'granted' | 'revoked' | 'revoked-all' | 'used' | 'denied' | 'expired' | 'check-passed' | 'check-failed' | 'auto-granted' | 'auto-granted-migration'
export type AuthMethod = 'biometric' | 'password'
export type CapabilityDenialReason = /** User explicitly denied in the consent dialog */ 'user-denied' /** Request was rate-limited (too many requests) */ | 'rate-limited' /** Capability requires re-a ...
export type CapabilityEventMap = { 'capability:granted': RegistryEvent; 'capability:revoked': RegistryEvent; }
export type CapabilityEvents = { 'capability:granted': RegistryEvent; 'capability:revoked': RegistryEvent; }
export type CapabilityPromptFn = (request: CapabilityPromptRequest) => Promise<CapabilityPromptResult>
export type CapabilityRiskLevel = 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'critical'
export type CapabilityScope = string & { readonly __brand?: 'CapabilityScope'; }
export type CapabilityTier = 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5
export type CapabilityTrigger = 'user-action' | 'feature-access'
export type CapabilityType = Tier0Capability | Tier1Capability | Tier2Capability | Tier3Capability | Tier4Capability | Tier5Capability
export type CompositeCapability = 'spreadsheet:full' | 'spreadsheet:readonly' | 'tables:full' | 'tables:readwrite' | 'tables:readonly' | 'filesystem:full' | 'filesystem:readwrite' | 'services:basic'
export type GrantChangeType = 'granted' | 'revoked' | 'expired' | 'denied' | 'denial-cleared'
export type GrantSource = 'user' | 'auto' | 'migration'
export type RegistryEventHandler = (event: RegistryEvent) => void
export type RegistryEventType = 'capability:granted' | 'capability:revoked'
export type Tier0Capability = 'cells:read' | 'cells:write' | 'sheets:read' | 'sheets:create' | 'sheets:delete' | 'sheets:rename' | 'formulas:read' | 'formulas:write' | 'formatting:read' | 'formatting: ...
export type Tier1Capability = 'tables:read' | 'tables:write' | 'tables:create' | 'tables:delete' | 'columns:schema'
export type Tier2Capability = 'events:subscribe' | 'clipboard:read' | 'clipboard:write' | 'undo:read' | 'undo:write' | 'notifications:send' | 'checkpoints:read' | 'checkpoints:create' | 'checkpoints:r ...
export type Tier3Capability = 'filesystem:read' | 'filesystem:write' | 'filesystem:delete' | 'dialogs:open' | 'dialogs:save' | 'shell:windowTitle' | 'shell:openExternal'
export type Tier4Capability = 'connections:read' | 'connections:write' | 'connections:create' | 'connections:native' | 'network:sameorigin' | 'network:allowlist' | 'network:localhost' | 'network:any'
export type Tier5Capability = 'credentials:use' | 'tables:readAll' | 'tables:writeAll' | 'cells:readAll' | 'cells:writeAll'
export type VectorClock = Record<string, number>
export type VectorClockComparison = 'before' | 'after' | 'concurrent' | 'equal'
